hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#F2F2F2]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#F2F2F2]
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#D4C4A8]

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for containers. Max width 1200px. Fix all responsive text overflow using break-words and proper container padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for data sections, Bento Grid for About/Skills.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Tactile Dark Neumorphism. Cards should have background #131316, a subtle 1px border (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)), and dual box-shadow (top-left light, bottom-right dark) to create depth without muddiness.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for primary cards, rounded-full for pills/tags, rounded-3xl for the hero image.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Impeccable.style inspired. Purposeful, functional animations. Only animate transform and opacity. Easing must mimic real object deceleration (e.g., cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Use Framer Motion. Elements should fade in and move slightly upwards: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 15 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}. Stagger reveals.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hover changes should be subtle. scale: 1.01 or y: -2px, with slightly enhanced shadow or border glow.
motion_and_interactions.data_pipeline_anim: Tracing beam effect or sequential pulsing dots on connecting lines to simulate data flowing through nodes in the visualization.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism dark (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0C0C0E]/70) with 1px bottom border. Remove 'OM_P.' branding. Keep links minimalist.
components.hero: Remove 'View Pipeline' button. Remove cheap gradient from 'Hi I'm Om Patel' - use solid text_primary color. Include a professional 3D minimalist avatar instead of a raw photo.
components.about: Redesign the split layout into a cohesive bento box or side-by-side balanced view. Integrate an elegant data pipeline visualization (Extraction -> Transformation -> Load) using connecting SVG nodes and glowing pulses, completely replacing the ugly old diagram.
components.experience: Timeline layout with a continuous vertical line. Highlight active or most recent nodes with the accent_primary or accent_beige color.
components.skills: Categorized Bento display (e.g., Languages, Tools, Databases). Use soft pills with 1px border and very soft background for individual skills.
components.projects: Neumorphic cards with project screenshots or abstract dark textures, featuring clear typography and a subtle 'View Project' CTA.
components.education_and_certs: Two separate elegant containers. Minimalist list view with dates right-aligned.
components.contact: Must prominently include the phrase: 'Got data stuck and need to have it transformed with analytics?'. Include a 'Request Resume' mailto button styled with the accent color.

hero_avatar.description: Professional minimalist 3D avatar for the hero section.

abstract_textures.description: Abstract dark subtle texture for use inside project cards or section backgrounds.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
